1.description: (Color online) Delivery Schedule and Account Settings Notes . (a) Delivery schedule settings. (b) Account settings.

2.description: (Color online) SKU, Order, and Delivery Information Notes . (a) SKU display. (b) Itemized order information. (c) Delivery confirmation.

4.description: (Color online) Overlapping Assortment Between Two Consecutive Weeks Notes . Overlapping assortment is shaded in a darker color. All 207 SKUs are included. The figure is generated based on pair-wise comparison between two consecutive weeks (i.e., weeks 1 and 2, weeks 2 and 3, and so forth). For example, the corresponding region between week 1 and week 2 is shaded in a darker color if an SKU is available in week 1 and also available in week 2, whereas the region between week 2 and week 3 is shaded in a lighter color if an SKU is available in week 2 but not available in week 3.

5.description: (Color online) Order Size and Scope Distributions Notes . (a) Order size (number of boxed units). (b) Order scope (number of SKUs).
